vi.name: NestJS Roadmap
vi.summary: Backend track để xây API, authentication, database workflows, services, queues và production-ready architecture theo progression từ core NestJS tới advanced backend patterns.

milestones.title: Node.js + TypeScript Foundation
milestones.description: Xây nền với runtime Node.js, async flow, module system, TypeScript types, interfaces, classes và tư duy backend bằng JavaScript hiện đại để chuẩn bị cho NestJS.

milestones.title: NestJS Core Architecture
milestones.description: Học thật chắc Modules, Controllers, Providers, Services, Dependency Injection, DTO, feature/shared/config module và project structure. Practice: Todo API, Users module, Posts module và refactor controller logic vào service.

milestones.title: Validation, Pipes & Error Handling
milestones.description: Bao phủ DTO validation, class-validator, class-transformer, ValidationPipe, ParseIntPipe, custom pipe, exception filters, error format và global error handling. Practice: validate create user DTO, custom validation pipe và standardize API errors.

milestones.title: Request Lifecycle & Cross-cutting Concerns
milestones.description: Đi qua middleware, guards, interceptors, pipes, filters, ExecutionContext, custom decorators và setup ở global/controller/route level. Practice: logging middleware, response transform interceptor, CurrentUser decorator, role guard và request timing interceptor.

milestones.title: Database with Prisma & PostgreSQL
milestones.description: Làm việc với database modeling, Prisma schema, migration, CRUD, relations, pagination, filtering, sorting, transactions, seed data và repository/service pattern. Practice: Blog CMS API, Course API, user/profile relation, pagination API và transaction order flow.

milestones.title: Authentication
milestones.description: Học register/login, password hashing, JWT access token, refresh token, cookie vs Authorization header, AuthGuard, current user, logout, token rotation basics và session strategy overview. Practice: Auth API, refresh token flow, protected profile route và React login integration.

milestones.title: Authorization & RBAC
milestones.description: Thiết kế roles, permissions, RBAC, policy-based access, public route decorator, admin-only routes, ownership check và resource-level permission. Practice: Admin dashboard API, owner-can-edit-own-post, moderator role và permission matrix.

milestones.title: API Documentation & Developer Experience
milestones.description: Chuẩn hóa Swagger/OpenAPI, API versioning, response examples, DTO documentation, error docs, Postman/Insomnia collection và API contract cho frontend. Practice: generate Swagger docs, write API contract và document auth endpoints.

milestones.title: Testing NestJS
milestones.description: Bao phủ unit test services, controller test, mock providers, e2e test, test auth guard, test validation, test database flow và test với fake repository. Practice: test AuthService, test UserController, e2e login flow và e2e CRUD flow.

milestones.title: Production Backend
milestones.description: Đi vào config management, logging, CORS, Helmet, rate limiting, file upload, health checks, Docker basics, deploy API, deploy database, environment strategy và monitoring basics. Practice: Dockerize NestJS, deploy NestJS + PostgreSQL, add health check, rate limiting và file upload validation.

milestones.title: Advanced NestJS Architecture
milestones.description: Mở rộng với caching, Redis, queues, background jobs, events, WebSocket, scheduler, CQRS overview, microservices overview, RabbitMQ/Kafka/gRPC overview và monorepo architecture. Practice: notification queue, realtime chat, cache product list, scheduled cleanup job và mini microservice.

outcomes: Có một NestJS roadmap rõ ràng từ foundation tới production và advanced architecture.
Đi từ core NestJS sang validation, request lifecycle, Prisma/PostgreSQL, auth, RBAC và testing.
Bám sát các concern production như Docker, Helmet, rate limiting, health checks và deployment.
Có đủ practice flows để nối phần học NestJS với project thực tế và interview prep.

support.title: Phù hợp cho ai?
support.description: Phù hợp với người muốn học backend TypeScript bài bản, từ NestJS core architecture tới auth, database workflows, Docker, testing và advanced backend patterns.
items: Node.js developer muốn chuyển sang backend có structure tốt hơn với NestJS
Frontend hoặc fullstack developer muốn mở rộng sang API, auth, Prisma và production backend
Người cần backend roadmap rõ để vừa build project vừa chuẩn bị interview

en.name: NestJS Roadmap
en.summary: Backend track for building APIs, authentication, database workflows, services, queues, and production-ready architecture through a progression from core NestJS to advanced backend patterns.

milestones.title: Node.js + TypeScript Foundation
milestones.description: Build the base with the Node.js runtime, async flow, the module system, TypeScript types, interfaces, classes, and the core backend mindset in modern JavaScript.

milestones.title: NestJS Core Architecture
milestones.description: Master Modules, Controllers, Providers, Services, Dependency Injection, DTOs, feature/shared/config modules, and project structure. Practice: Todo API, Users module, Posts module, and refactoring controller logic into services.

milestones.title: Validation, Pipes & Error Handling
milestones.description: Cover DTO validation, class-validator, class-transformer, ValidationPipe, ParseIntPipe, custom pipes, exception filters, error formatting, and global error handling. Practice: validate a create-user DTO, build a custom validation pipe, and standardize API errors.

milestones.title: Request Lifecycle & Cross-cutting Concerns
milestones.description: Work through middleware, guards, interceptors, pipes, filters, ExecutionContext, custom decorators, and global/controller/route-level setup. Practice: logging middleware, response-transform interceptor, CurrentUser decorator, role guard, and request-timing interceptor.

milestones.title: Database with Prisma & PostgreSQL
milestones.description: Use database modeling, Prisma schema design, migrations, CRUD, relations, pagination, filtering, sorting, transactions, seed data, and the repository/service pattern. Practice: Blog CMS API, Course API, user/profile relation, pagination API, and transaction order flow.

milestones.title: Authentication
milestones.description: Learn register/login, password hashing, JWT access tokens, refresh tokens, cookies vs Authorization headers, AuthGuard, current user, logout, token rotation basics, and session strategy overview. Practice: Auth API, refresh token flow, protected profile route, and React login integration.

milestones.title: Authorization & RBAC
milestones.description: Design roles, permissions, RBAC, policy-based access, a public-route decorator, admin-only routes, ownership checks, and resource-level permissions. Practice: Admin dashboard API, owner-can-edit-own-post flow, moderator role, and a permission matrix.

milestones.title: API Documentation & Developer Experience
milestones.description: Standardize Swagger/OpenAPI, API versioning, response examples, DTO documentation, error docs, Postman/Insomnia collections, and frontend-facing API contracts. Practice: generate Swagger docs, write an API contract, and document auth endpoints.

milestones.title: Testing NestJS
milestones.description: Cover unit testing services, controller testing, mock providers, e2e tests, testing auth guards, testing validation, testing database flow, and fake repositories. Practice: test AuthService, test UserController, e2e login flow, and e2e CRUD flow.

milestones.title: Production Backend
milestones.description: Move into config management, logging, CORS, Helmet, rate limiting, file upload, health checks, Docker basics, deploying the API, deploying the database, environment strategy, and monitoring basics. Practice: Dockerize NestJS, deploy NestJS + PostgreSQL, add health checks, rate limiting, and file-upload validation.

milestones.title: Advanced NestJS Architecture
milestones.description: Expand into caching, Redis, queues, background jobs, events, WebSocket, schedulers, a CQRS overview, a microservices overview, RabbitMQ/Kafka/gRPC overviews, and monorepo architecture. Practice: notification queue, realtime chat, cached product lists, scheduled cleanup jobs, and a mini microservice.

outcomes: Follow a NestJS roadmap from foundation through production and advanced architecture.
Move from core NestJS into validation, request lifecycle, Prisma/PostgreSQL, auth, RBAC, and testing.
Stay close to production concerns like Docker, Helmet, rate limiting, health checks, and deployment.
Use practice flows to connect NestJS learning with real projects and interview prep.

support.title: Who is this for?
support.description: A strong fit for learners who want a structured TypeScript backend path from NestJS core architecture into auth, database workflows, Docker, testing, and advanced backend patterns.
items: Node.js developers moving into a more structured NestJS backend stack
Frontend or fullstack developers expanding into APIs, auth, Prisma, and production backend work
Developers who want a clear backend roadmap for both projects and interview prep

ja.name: NestJS Roadmap
ja.summary: core NestJS から advanced backend patterns まで進みながら、API、authentication、database workflows、queues、production-ready architecture を身につけるための backend track です。

milestones.title: Node.js + TypeScript Foundation
milestones.description: Node.js runtime、async flow、module system、TypeScript の types、interfaces、classes を通して backend の土台を固めます。

milestones.title: NestJS Core Architecture
milestones.description: Modules、Controllers、Providers、Services、Dependency Injection、DTO、feature/shared/config module、project structure を固めます。Practice: Todo API、Users module、Posts module、controller logic の service への分離。

milestones.title: Validation, Pipes & Error Handling
milestones.description: DTO validation、class-validator、class-transformer、ValidationPipe、ParseIntPipe、custom pipe、exception filters、error format、global error handling を学びます。Practice: create-user DTO validation、custom validation pipe、API errors の standardization。

milestones.title: Request Lifecycle & Cross-cutting Concerns
milestones.description: middleware、guards、interceptors、pipes、filters、ExecutionContext、custom decorators、global/controller/route-level setup を整理します。Practice: logging middleware、response transform interceptor、CurrentUser decorator、role guard、request timing interceptor。

milestones.title: Database with Prisma & PostgreSQL
milestones.description: database modeling、Prisma schema、migration、CRUD、relations、pagination、filtering、sorting、transactions、seed data、repository/service pattern を扱います。Practice: Blog CMS API、Course API、user/profile relation、pagination API、transaction order flow。

milestones.title: Authentication
milestones.description: register/login、password hashing、JWT access token、refresh token、cookie vs Authorization header、AuthGuard、current user、logout、token rotation basics、session strategy overview を学びます。Practice: Auth API、refresh token flow、protected profile route、React login integration。

milestones.title: Authorization & RBAC
milestones.description: roles、permissions、RBAC、policy-based access、public route decorator、admin-only routes、ownership check、resource-level permission を設計します。Practice: Admin dashboard API、owner can edit own post、moderator role、permission matrix。

milestones.title: API Documentation & Developer Experience
milestones.description: Swagger/OpenAPI、API versioning、response examples、DTO documentation、error docs、Postman/Insomnia collection、frontend 向け API contract を整えます。Practice: Swagger docs generation、API contract、auth endpoints の documentation。

milestones.title: Testing NestJS
milestones.description: unit test services、controller test、mock providers、e2e test、auth guard test、validation test、database flow test、fake repository を通して testing fundamentals を固めます。Practice: AuthService test、UserController test、e2e login flow、e2e CRUD flow。

milestones.title: Production Backend
milestones.description: config management、logging、CORS、Helmet、rate limiting、file upload、health checks、Docker basics、API/database deploy、environment strategy、monitoring basics を押さえます。Practice: Dockerize NestJS、NestJS + PostgreSQL deploy、health check、rate limiting、file upload validation。

milestones.title: Advanced NestJS Architecture
milestones.description: caching、Redis、queues、background jobs、events、WebSocket、scheduler、CQRS overview、microservices overview、RabbitMQ/Kafka/gRPC overview、monorepo architecture に進みます。Practice: notification queue、realtime chat、cached product list、scheduled cleanup job、mini microservice。

outcomes: foundation から production、advanced architecture まで進める NestJS roadmap です。
core NestJS から validation、request lifecycle、Prisma/PostgreSQL、auth、RBAC、testing まで段階的に学べます。
Docker、Helmet、rate limiting、health checks、deployment といった production concerns に近い流れで進められます。
practice flows を通して NestJS の学びを real projects と interview prep につなげられます。

support.title: こんな人におすすめ
support.description: NestJS core architecture から auth、database workflows、Docker、testing、advanced backend patterns まで、構造的に TypeScript backend を学びたい人に向いています。
items: より structure のある NestJS backend に進みたい Node.js developer
API、auth、Prisma、production backend work まで広げたい frontend / fullstack developer
project と interview prep の両方に使える backend roadmap が欲しい人
